caption: A government hearing takes place in a room with wood paneling and orange accents. Four people are seated behind a table: a woman in a red jacket, a woman in a white blazer and black top, a man in a dark suit and blue tie, and a man in a grey suit. A fifth man, wearing glasses and a dark blazer, is seated in the foreground facing the others. He appears to be speaking or listening intently, resting his chin on his hand in some frames. On-screen text at the bottom includes the "ORCA" logo and the text "April 12, 2019 House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs S.23 Increasing the Minimum Wage". Visible objects on the table include a water bottle, a small orange, and several documents. Throughout the sequence, the individuals remain in their positions, with slight shifts in posture and gaze as they engage in the proceeding.
